en: At that time Jesus went through the grainfields on the Sabbath. His disciples were hungry, and they began to pluck heads of grain and to eat.
zh: 安息日那天，耶穌從麥田經過；他的門徒餓了，就摘了些麥穗來吃。

en: But when the Pharisees saw it, they said to him, "Look, your disciples are doing what is not lawful to do on the Sabbath."
zh: 法利賽人看見了，就對他說：“你看，你的門徒作了安息日不可作的事。”

en: He said to them, "Have you not read what David did when he was hungry, and those who were with him:
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“大衛和跟他在一起的人，在飢餓的時候所作的，你們沒有念過嗎？

en: how he entered the house of God and ate the bread of the Presence, which it was not lawful for him to eat nor for those who were with him, but only for the priests?
zh: 他不是進了 神的殿，吃了他和跟他在一起的人不可以吃，只有祭司才可以吃的陳設餅嗎？

en: Or have you not read in the Law how on the Sabbath the priests in the temple profane the Sabbath and are guiltless?
zh: 律法書上記著：安息日，祭司在殿裡供職，觸犯了安息日，也不算有罪；你們也沒有念過嗎？

en: I tell you, something greater than the temple is here.
zh: 我告訴你們，這裡有一位是比聖殿更大的。

en: And if you had known what this means, 'I desire mercy, and not sacrifice,' you would not have condemned the guiltless.
zh: 如果你們明白‘我喜愛憐憫，不喜愛祭祀’這句話的意思，就不會把無罪的定罪了。

en: For the Son of Man is lord of the Sabbath."
zh: 因為人子是安息日的主。”

en: He went on from there and entered their synagogue.
zh: 耶穌離開那裡，來到他們的會堂。

en: And a man was there with a withered hand. And they asked him, "Is it lawful to heal on the Sabbath?"- so that they might accuse him.
zh: 會堂裡有一個人，他的一隻手枯乾了。有人問耶穌：“在安息日治病，可以嗎？”目的是要控告耶穌。

en: He said to them, "Which one of you who has a sheep, if it falls into a pit on the Sabbath, will not take hold of it and lift it out?
zh: 耶穌回答：“你們當中有哪一個，他僅有的一隻羊在安息日跌進坑裡，會不把羊抓住拉上來呢？

en: Of how much more value is a man than a sheep! So it is lawful to do good on the Sabbath."
zh: 人比羊貴重得多了！所以，在安息日行善是可以的。”

en: Then he said to the man, "Stretch out your hand." And the man stretched it out, and it was restored, healthy like the other.
zh: 於是對那人說：“伸出手來！”他把手一伸，就復原了，好像另一隻手一樣。

en: But the Pharisees went out and conspired against him, how to destroy him.
zh: 法利賽人出去，商議怎樣對付耶穌，好殺掉他。

en: Jesus, aware of this, withdrew from there. And many followed him, and he healed them all
zh: 耶穌知道了，就離開那裡。有很多人跟隨他，他醫好他們所有的病人，

en: and ordered them not to make him known.
zh: 又囑咐他們不可替他張揚。

en: This was to fulfill what was spoken by the prophet Isaiah:
zh: 這就應驗了以賽亞先知所說的：

en: "Behold, my servant whom I have chosen, my beloved with whom my soul is well pleased. I will put my Spirit upon him, and he will proclaim justice to the Gentiles.
zh: “看哪！我所揀選的僕人， 我所愛，心裡所喜悅的； 我要把我的靈賜給他， 他必向萬國宣揚公理。

en: He will not quarrel or cry aloud, nor will anyone hear his voice in the streets;
zh: 他不爭吵，也不喧嚷， 人在街上聽不見他的聲音。

en: a bruised reed he will not break, and a smoldering wick he will not quench, until he brings justice to victory;
zh: 壓傷的蘆葦，他不折斷， 將殘的燈火，他不吹滅； 直到他施行公理，使公理得勝。

en: and in his name the Gentiles will hope."
zh: 萬民都要寄望於他的名。”

en: Then a demon-oppressed man who was blind and mute was brought to him, and he healed him, so that the man spoke and saw.
zh: 有人帶了一個被鬼附著、又瞎又啞的人到耶穌那裡。耶穌醫好了他，那啞巴就能說話，也能看見了。

en: And all the people were amazed, and said, "Can this be the Son of David?"
zh: 群眾都很驚奇，說：“難道他就是大衛的子孫？”

en: But when the Pharisees heard it, they said, "It is only by Beelzebul, the prince of demons, that this man casts out demons."
zh: 法利賽人聽見了，說：“這個人趕鬼，只不過是靠鬼王別西卜罷了。”

en: Knowing their thoughts, he said to them, "Every kingdom divided against itself is laid waste, and no city or house divided against itself will stand.
zh: 耶穌知道他們的心思，就對他們說：“如果一個國家自相紛爭，就必定荒涼；一城一家自相紛爭，必站立不住。

en: And if Satan casts out Satan, he is divided against himself. How then will his kingdom stand?
zh: 如果撒但趕逐撒但，就會自相紛爭。那麼，他的國怎能站立得住呢？

en: And if I cast out demons by Beelzebul, by whom do your sons cast them out? Therefore they will be your judges.
zh: 我若靠別西卜趕鬼，你們的子孫又靠誰趕鬼呢？這樣，他們就要斷定你們的不是。

en: But if it is by the Spirit of God that I cast out demons, then the kingdom of God has come upon you.
zh: 我若靠 神的靈趕鬼， 神的國就已經臨到你們了。

en: Or how can someone enter a strong man's house and plunder his goods, unless he first binds the strong man? Then indeed he may plunder his house.
zh: 如果不先把壯漢綁起來，怎能進到他的家裡，搶奪財物呢？如果綁起來了，就可以搶劫他的家了。

en: Whoever is not with me is against me, and whoever does not gather with me scatters.
zh: 不站在我這一邊的就是反對我的，不跟我一起收聚的，就是分散的。

en: Therefore I tell you, every sin and blasphemy will be forgiven people, but the blasphemy against the Spirit will not be forgiven.
zh: 因此，我告訴你們，人的一切罪和褻瀆的話，都可以赦免；可是，褻瀆聖靈就得不著赦免。

en: And whoever speaks a word against the Son of Man will be forgiven, but whoever speaks against the Holy Spirit will not be forgiven, either in this age or in the age to come.
zh: 無論誰說話得罪了人子，還可以赦免；但說話得罪了聖靈的，今生來世都得不著赦免。

en: "Either make the tree good and its fruit good, or make the tree bad and its fruit bad, for the tree is known by its fruit.
zh: “你們種好樹就結好果子，種壞樹就結壞果子；憑著果子就能認出樹來。

en: You brood of vipers! How can you speak good, when you are evil? For out of the abundance of the heart the mouth speaks.
zh: 毒蛇所生的啊，你們既然是邪惡的，怎能說出良善的話？因為心中所充滿的，口裡就說出來。

en: The good person out of his good treasure brings forth good, and the evil person out of his evil treasure brings forth evil.
zh: 良善的人從他良善的心 發出良善，邪惡的人從他邪惡的心 發出邪惡。

en: I tell you, on the day of judgment people will give account for every careless word they speak,
zh: 我告訴你們，人所說的閒話，在審判的日子，句句都要供出來，

en: for by your words you will be justified, and by your words you will be condemned."
zh: 因為你要照你的話被稱為義，或定為有罪。”

en: Then some of the scribes and Pharisees answered him, saying, "Teacher, we wish to see a sign from you."
zh: 當時，有一些經學家和法利賽人對耶穌說：“老師，我們想請你顯個神蹟看看。”

en: But he answered them, "An evil and adulterous generation seeks for a sign, but no sign will be given to it except the sign of the prophet Jonah.
zh: 但耶穌說：“邪惡和淫亂的世代尋求神蹟，除了約拿先知的神蹟以外，再沒有神蹟給你們了。

en: For just as Jonah was three days and three nights in the belly of the great fish, so will the Son of Man be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth.
zh: 約拿怎樣三日三夜在大魚的腹中，人子也要照樣三日三夜在地裡。

en: The men of Nineveh will rise up at the judgment with this generation and condemn it, for they repented at the preaching of Jonah, and behold, something greater than Jonah is here.
zh: 審判的時候，尼尼微人要和這個世代一同起來，定這個世代的罪，因為他們聽了約拿所傳的就悔改了。你看，這裡有一位是比約拿更大的。

en: The queen of the South will rise up at the judgment with this generation and condemn it, for she came from the ends of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon, and behold, something greater than Solomon is here.
zh: 審判的時候，南方的女王要和這個世代一同起來，定這個世代的罪，因為她從地極來到，要聽所羅門智慧的話。你看，這裡有一位是比所羅門更大的。

en: "When the unclean spirit has gone out of a person, it passes through waterless places seeking rest, but finds none.
zh: “有一個污靈離開了一個人，走遍乾旱之地，尋找棲身的地方，卻沒有找到。

en: Then it says, 'I will return to my house from which I came.' And when it comes, it finds the house empty, swept, and put in order.
zh: 他就說：‘我要回到我從前離開了的那房子。’到了之後，看見裡面空著，已經打掃乾淨，粉飾好了，

en: Then it goes and brings with it seven other spirits more evil than itself, and they enter and dwell there, and the last state of that person is worse than the first. So also will it be with this evil generation."
zh: 他就去帶了另外七個比自己更惡的污靈來，一齊進去住在那裡；那人後來的情況，比以前更壞了。這邪惡的世代也會這樣。”

en: While he was still speaking to the people, behold, his mother and his brothers stood outside, asking to speak to him.
zh: 耶穌還在對群眾講話的時候，他的母親和弟弟站在外面，要找他講話。
有人告訴耶穌：“你的母親和弟弟站在外面，有話要跟你說。”

en: But he replied to the man who told him, "Who is my mother, and who are my brothers?"
zh: 他回答那人：“誰是我的母親？誰是我的弟兄？”

en: And stretching out his hand toward his disciples, he said, "Here are my mother and my brothers!
zh: 他伸手指著門徒說：“你看，我的母親，我的弟兄！

en: For whoever does the will of my Father in heaven is my brother and sister and mother."
zh: 凡是遵行我天父旨意的，就是我的弟兄、姊妹和母親了。”
